data.title: Supreme Court cautious about affecting Fed independence in live coverage, crucial for market stability.
data.description: The preservation of Federal Reserve independence is under scrutiny in the ongoing case. The Supreme Court is cautious about potentially jeopardizing this independence. This information was shared live on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Cornerstone Building Brands partners with AUO Energy to integrate SunSteel™ Solar Panels with Double-Lok™ Metal Roofing Panels in new partnership.
data.description: A partnership has been formed between Cornerstone Building Brands and AUO Energy Business in Cary, North Carolina. They are working together to provide SunSteel solar panels integrated with Double-Lok metal roofing. This collaboration aims to enhance the energy efficiency of buildings by combining sustainable solar technology with durable roofing solutions. This initiative may significantly contribute to reducing carbon emissions and promoting renewable energy sources.
TESLA SHARES UP 2.2%

data.title: Reading Is Fundamental (RIF) celebrates 60 years, aims to inspire lifelong readers. Leading children's literacy nonprofit.
data.description: In a press release dated January 21, 2026, Reading Is Fundamental (RIF), a prominent nonprofit organization dedicated to children's literacy, declares its enhanced vision for the future as it commemorates its 60th anniversary. Founded in 1966, RIF has been at the forefront of promoting reading and learning among children, with a primary goal of providing every child with the essential skill of reading. This milestone marks six decades of dedication in ensuring that children have the resources and support needed to cultivate a love for reading and learning.
US MILITARY SAYS FORCES LAUNCH MISSION IN SYRIA TO TRANSFER ISLAMIC STATE PRISONERS TO IRAQ

data.title: Mouser Electronics launches Motor Control Resource Hub for engineers to advance motor control in technologies like e-bikes and drones for efficiency and range.
data.description: Mouser Electronics, Inc., based in Dallas & Fort Worth, Texas, is supporting engineers in advancing motor control design through its online resource center. Motor control technology aims to accurately manage a motor's speed, torque, and position. These advancements are vital for modern mobility and electric vehicle (EV) systems, enhancing both effectiveness and distance covered. This technology finds applications in various sectors like e-bikes, drones, robotics, and light electric vehicles (LEVs), among others.

data.title: Global Clean Energy Technology Market valued at $344,290M in 2024 to reach $516,100M by 2031 due to government mandates and corporate pledges.
data.description: In Bangalore, India, as of January 21, 2026, the global Clean Energy Technology market was valued at USD 344,290 million in 2024, according to Valuates Reports. It is forecasted to grow and reach USD 516,100 million in the near future.

data.title: TN Marketing's Craft & Hobby platform adds over 40 hours of kids' programming from Sensical Library, enhancing learning opportunities.
data.description: Craft & Hobby subscribers now have access to more than 40 hours of top-notch, age-appropriate content. This expansion comes from TN Marketing's direct-to-library streaming platform. Craft & Hobby aims to provide quality entertainment while catering to various interests. This move aligns with their goal of offering diverse and engaging content.

data.title: Health podcast "1,000 Waking Minutes" enters 2nd season, hosted by Dr. Wendy Bazilian; focuses on practical, science-based strategies for healthy aging.
data.description: Dr. Wendy Bazilian, a renowned dietitian and public health expert, is hosting a show focusing on science-based strategies for healthy aging. The show, based in San Diego, began on Jan. 21, 2026. With increasing public interest in longevity and healthy aging, Dr. Bazilian aims to provide practical advice on staying healthy as people age. The show touches on important topics such as nutrition, lifestyle choices, and exercise to promote overall well-being. Keep an eye out for valuable insights and strategies for healthy aging from Dr. Bazilian on the program.
